metadata.description: CandyCo's internal Claude Code plugin marketplace.

plugins.name: candyco-design-system
plugins.description: CandyCo's design system — colors, typography, voice, components, fonts, logos, the paged 8.5×11 report template, and board-deck scaffolding. The default visual language for every CandyCo artifact.

plugins.name: candyco-mrp
plugins.description: Procurement MRP: enter a finished-good item number and get a one-page ~30-week MRP report (Excel + HTML) for every purchased component of its multi-level BOM, straight from live NetSuite. Replaces the manual item-by-item Copy & Paste process.
